channel.title: Emre Cecanpunar — notes
channel.description: Notes on Linux graphics, GPU drivers and compilers.

item.title: aco-pack-constant shift: a patch that never fired
item.description: An ACO optimizer experiment that never triggered in shader-db.

item.title: aco_dump: compiling shaders without a GPU
item.description: SPIR-V to ACO IR through RADV/ACO without a physical GPU.

item.title: Getting started with Mesa
item.description: Mesa build setup, driver selection, source paths, and debug switches.

item.title: How graphics drivers work
item.description: A short map from Vulkan calls to GPU machine code.
